summary.en: Turkey-facing power tools should be managed with EU-referenced RoHS substance control where EN/EU-aligned CE logic is used, including material traceability, declaration wording, and exemption rationale for cables, switches, tools, chargers, and accessories.
summary.zh: 在土耳其市场采用CE对齐逻辑时，电动工具应按EU参考的RoHS物质控制管理，包括线缆、开关、工具本体、充电器和附件的材料可追溯性、声明措辞和豁免理由。
summary.zht: 在土耳其市場採用CE對齊邏輯時，電動工具應按EU參考的RoHS物質控制管理，包括電纜、開關、工具本體、充電器和附件的材料可追溯性、聲明措辭和豁免理由。

summary.en: China RoHS and GB-level material statements are common baselines for domestic shipment, but Turkey-facing claims still require statement mapping to the Turkey-aligned CE/TSE evidence package.
summary.zh: 中国RoHS和GB级材料声明常用于国内出货，但土耳其向文件仍需将声明映射到土耳其对齐的CE/TSE证据包。
summary.zht: 中國RoHS和GB級材料聲明常用於國內出貨，但土耳其向文件仍需將聲明映射到土耳其對齊的CE/TSE證據包。

gap.en: The exporter gap is usually statement-level, where homogeneous-material declarations and export model mapping are incomplete for Turkish customs-facing technical files.
gap.zh: 出口商常见差距是声明层面不足，特别是同质材料声明和出口型号映射不完整，导致土耳其技术文件不足。
gap.zht: 出口商常見差距是聲明層面不足，特別是同質材料聲明與出口型號映射不完整，導致土耳其技術文件不足。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation to apply restricted-substance controls and documentation for in-scope electrical and electronic products; EN/IEC documentation routes are technical aids.
mandatory_status.cn: 中国RoHS基线是国内要求，但未必构成土耳其市场完整证明。

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Chinese declarations as background only and add Turkey-facing model-specific RoHS evidence and declaration coverage before release to market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将中国声明视为背景材料，并在投放前补充土耳其向的型号级RoHS证据与声明覆盖。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將中國聲明視為背景材料，並在投放前補充土耳其向的型號級RoHS證據與聲明覆蓋。

requirement_topic.en: Cordless Tool Batteries and Compliance Layer
requirement_topic.zh: 无绳工具电池及其合规层
requirement_topic.zht: 無繩工具電池及其合規層

summary.en: Cordless tools must be assessed at battery level as well as tool level in Turkey-facing CE/TSE routes, including removable battery handling, marking, and economic-operator obligations where the battery is part of the placed product.
summary.zh: 无绳工具在土耳其方向上应在工具层面外再按电池层级审查，包括可拆卸电池处理、标识和经济经营者义务，因为电池是放市产品的一部分。
summary.zht: 無繩工具在土耳其方向上應在工具層面之外再按電池層級審查，包括可拆卸電池處理、標識和經濟經營者義務，因為電池是投放產品的一部分。

standards_or_laws: Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 (applied through CE-aligned interpretation in Turkey-facing references)
Applicable lithium-battery transport and safety evidence for export logistics

summary.en: Chinese files may bundle battery packs with the tool package under GB-based testing and transport controls, but Turkey-facing placement often needs extra battery-layer documentation tied to model-level marking and importer evidence.
summary.zh: 中国文件常将电池包与工具作为一体按GB测试和运输管理打包，但土耳其投放通常需要额外的电池层级文件，并与型号级标识和进口商证据绑定。
summary.zht: 中國文件常將電池包與工具作為一體按GB測試和運輸管理打包，但土耳其投放通常需要額外的電池層級文件，並與型號級標識和進口商證據綁定。

standards_or_laws: China lithium-battery safety and transport papers

gap.en: Frequent exporter risk is using one tool-level declaration for both corded and cordless variants or omitting battery-marking and replaceability analysis for exported battery models.
gap.zh: 常见风险是用同一份工具级声明覆盖有绳和无绳版本，或遗漏出口电池型号的标识与可拆卸性分析。
gap.zht: 常見風險是使用同一份工具級聲明覆蓋有線與無線版本，或遺漏出口電池型號的標識與可拆卸性分析。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation for in-scope batteries in placement is separate from tool-level testing and requires battery-level compliance documentation in Turkey-facing workflows.
mandatory_status.cn: 中国工具与电池检测不能自动覆盖土耳其放市电池层级义务。

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Turkey-ready for cordless tools until battery-level evidence for each model, marking scope, and importer traceability is added with the tool-level technical file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对无绳工具而言，在每个型号的电池级证据、标识范围和进口商追溯链加入工具技术文件前，不能视为土耳其就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對無繩工具而言，在每個型號的電池級證據、標識範圍和進口商追溯鏈加入工具技術文件前，不能視為土耳其就緒。
